# Champion Mobile Detailing - Muskogee OK

Champion Mobile Detailing is the premier provider of mobile car care, paint correction, and ceramic coating services in Muskogee and surrounding Green Country areas.

## Core Value Proposition
- **Total Mobility:** We bring our own water and power to your home or office.
- **Surface Specialists:** Certified ceramic coating installers and interior restoration experts.
- **Convenience:** Showroom results delivered without the client ever leaving their location.

## Contact & Location
- **Address:** 700 N Main St, Muskogee, OK 74401
- **Phone:** (918) 212-0313
- **Website:** https://www.championdetail.com
- **Area Served:** Muskogee, Fort Gibson, Tahlequah, Wagoner.

## Service Tiers
- **The Executive Interior ($120+):** Deep therapeutic cabin cleaning, sanitization, and conditioning.
- **The Showroom Restoration ($180+):** Full interior/exterior reset with clay bar and paint sealant.
- **The Ceramic Shield ($500+):** Paint correction followed by a semi-permanent ceramic/graphene coating.

## Hours
- Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed
